reviews.reviewNegatives:
Je n´ai pas aimé que le personnel soit  totalement indifférent. 
Que la chambre soit vétuste, insalubre ( papier qui de déchire,  moisissures, robinetteries qui ne tient pas aux murs, une moquette extrêmement sale et puante, des traces sur les murs, une odeur globale nauséabonde) et être réveillée à 4h00 du matin par une odeur bien pire que celles des égouts.  Le petit-déjeuner,  quasi rien de proposé, buffets quasi vides, tables sales et couverts également. La piscine est fermée à 18h00 on ne sait pourquoi ce jour là,  en tout cas c´était pour moi un  hôtel de transfert ou je souhaitais me baigner 1 peu et bien rien en a été.  Ah oui j´oubliais  le dîner du soir qui n´a pas pu être pris avant 21h00. Je ne retournerai ni ne conseillerai cet établissement pour rien au monde.

reviews.reviewComments: I had a wonderful stay at Hermes Hotel in Banda Aceh. The location is easily accessible and within walking distance to several great food attractions. It's also conveniently close to the city center, making it a perfect base for exploring the area. The hotel itself is comfortable and clean, and the staff were exceptionally friendly and helpful throughout my stay. I would definitely return if visiting Banda Aceh again. Highly recommended

reviews.reviewPositives:
Das Hotel war schon beim Betreten eine Wucht. Die Lobby war wirklich schön gestaltet. Der Pool schien auf den ersten Blick gepflegt zu sein. Man darf diesen zwar nicht im Bikini betreten, aber das sollte einem schon bewusst sein, bevor man nach Banda Aceh reist. Es gibt eine Raucheretage, was wir so gar nicht mehr kennen. Unser Flur (Nichtaucher) hat hervorragend gerochen und die Zimmer waren sehr stilvoll eingerichtet und sauber. Das Personal am Empfang war schnell beim Check-in und sehr zuvorkommend. Beim Abendessen gibt es die Option das Buffet zu buchen. Aber Vorsicht! Das Essen ist unfassbar scharf (Selbst wenn das Personal felsenfest behauptet, dass es das nicht sei ;)). Das Frühstücksbuffet ist sehr umfangreich und sah sehr ansprechend aus. Gefrühstückt werden kann ab 6 Uhr morgens. 
Das Hotel wird - soweit wir das verstanden haben - auch als eine Art Konferenzzentrum genutzt, sodass es beim Buffet abends dann bisschen Rummel geben kann, aber ich fand es eher amüsant und überhaupt nicht störend.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Wenn ich etwas nennen muss, dann vielleicht, dass das Zimmer leicht hellhörig war. Sobald jemand auf dem Flur langlief, hat man das im Zimmer direkt gehört, aber es war nicht extrem und das nenne ich auch nur, weil ich angestrengt darüber nachdenken musste, was mir nicht gefallen hat.

reviews.reviewTitle: Disappointing Chauffeur Service Mars Otherwise Pleasant Stay
reviews.reviewComments:
My recent stay  was unfortunately marred by a significant issue concerning the pre-arranged chauffeur service. While many aspects of the hotel were enjoyable, the lack of communication and subsequent unexpected charge for a service I did not fully utilize left a sour taste.
Prior to my arrival, I had arranged for a chauffeur. However, despite this arrangement, I received absolutely no confirmation – neither a phone call nor an email – regarding the service. This lack of proactive communication was a red flag that, in hindsight, I should have addressed more vigorously.
Upon my arrival, it became clear that the chauffeur service, which I had expected to be seamlessly integrated, was not as confirmed as it should have been. To my dismay, I ultimately had to pay for this service, despite the significant communication breakdown and the fact that I did not enjoy the benefit of a confirmed and smoothly executed transfer. This felt like an unfair imposition, especially after the lack of any prior notification.
While I appreciate "the comfortable room," "the friendly front desk staff," "the convenient location", the disorganization surrounding the chauffeur service and the unexpected cost truly detracted from my overall experience. I strongly urge the hotel management to improve their communication protocols for pre-booked services, particularly those involving an additional charge, to avoid similar frustrations for future guests.

Ada satu petugas tapi hanya melihat

Kamarnya kurang bersih, terlihat bagian yang tidak bersih tervacum, shower sudah berkarat, mungkin karena sudah lama dan tidak ada perawatan

Keunggulan hotel ini hanya pada kolam renang, jika anda ke kota banda aceh dengan anak kecil, saya sangat merekomendasikannnya
Dan lokasinya yang dekat dengan warung kopi serta mesjid yang berjarak 5menit jalan kaki
reviews.reviewComments:
The service upon the guest's arrival was poor; my wife came down carrying the child and luggage but did not receive help when struggling to open the door, around 2:00 PM. There was one staff member but they just watched.

The room was not very clean, areas were visibly dusty, and the shower was rusty, probably due to age and lack of maintenance.

The hotel's only advantage is the swimming pool; if you are in Banda Aceh with small children, I highly recommend it. Also, its location is close to a coffee shop and a mosque, within a 5-minute walk.

reviews.reviewTitle: Pleasant Stay at Hermes Palace Aceh
reviews.reviewPositives:
A comfortable stay was experienced at Hermes Palace Aceh in the Executive Deluxe room, which was found to be spacious and clean.

The service was warmly provided by the staff, and helpful assistance was always offered when needed. A good variety of breakfast options was served, and the food was enjoyed each morning.

The pool was appreciated for its moderate size and calm atmosphere. Transportation was easily arranged using Grab or rented vehicles. Nearby eateries and grocery stores were easily accessed, and most local attractions and souvenir shops could be reached within 10–20 minutes, depending on traffic.

Overall, the stay was made enjoyable and smooth. A return visit would definitely be considered.

I really wanted to give this hotel a 4 to 5 star rating, but I just couldn't, I gave them 2 instead and here are the reasons for it:

The Good
- Hospitality 5/5. The kind and helpful staffs. 
- Food 3.5/5. Breakfast was decent. Good but nothing special.
- Room 3.5/5. Spacious, very spacious.
- Price 5/5. I got a very good deal, if I have to pay the full asking price I'd gladly gave them 1 star.

The Bad.
- Cleanliness 3/5. I came to a room with chilli stains on the wall outlet. Luckily there's a staff nearby to help me clean it. Toilet smells a bit odd.
- Water pressure 2.5/5. Shower pressure was low, never a satisfying shower during the stay.
- Noise Level 1/5. I don't know whether it's their thin walls or what. You could hear people slamming their doors and stompings. The worst would be my second night where my next room neighbor had a "party" or some gathering. Started at 12 at midnight they begin laughing, yelling, stomping, slamming doors, repeatedly clicking switches, and more. The weird part was there are multiple female sounds. Aren't male guests not allowed to bring female company? Or the rules are only on paper? Maybe they are truly family, but who knows. I had a tiring day and couldn't sleep at all because of them. Really wanted to call the front desk to complain but I'm afraid I might get things worst / made them angry as I'm a mere tourist while they're local (sounds local/dialect). Finally my fatigue is at limit and I fell asleep after 3 AM, and guess what, they're still laughing out loud. I don't know why other guests keep quiet as well, maybe the same reason I had.

I really hope the management take this review seriously. Most guest stayed at a hotel to feel peace and relax, shame my stay were nerve-wracking.

reviews.reviewComments:
ATTROCIOUS!! The first room were given had a sewerage and stale smoke smell in it. They tried to "fix" it with a perfume spray" when I asked to be relocated they did so by moving us to a non smoking room, which smelled slightly better.
The bathroom still stunk of sewerage. We had to keep that door closed to keep the smell out of the room, to allow us to sleep at night.
The bathtub(with shower in it) did not drain away properly so after a minute you were standing in dirty soapy water. The water from the bathtub leaked out onto the main bathroom floor, thereby contributing to the bad smell.
The staff did not speak good english(especially for a 5 star hotel). I asked them about going to the Aceh Museum they smiled and gave me a map on which they could not locate the museum for me. And they could not/ DID NOT tell me that the Aceh Museum and the Tsunami Museum are both closed on Mondays ( the day I went out there, a wasted journey which could have been avoided in the heat if the staff were better at their job).
Dirty smelly carpet, full of stains. I got a small piece of glass in my foot by walking around the room barefoot.
Definitely not 4or5 star. Lucky to be 2 star.
The reviews on Agoda which I used to make my decision about booking this hotel are inaccurate

I quite enjoyed staying in this hotel. The room is not big but has ok lay out. There is a big window so it makes the room less cramped and bright. The bed is comfortable and the pillows are fluffy. No breakfast. But there's a cute cafe downstairs that sells coffee, latte and cappuccino with omelette and some variety of sandwiches. 

The downside is it has no telephone in the room, only in the hallway. Sometimes, when I need to call the front desk to ask about something (internet, etc) I have to go out of the room - so that's a bit not convenient. The bathroom is clean but there's this sewage smell time to time. I think it is because the hotel is new and that they cannot control the sewage system around Pasar Baru. They might want to report this to the city government. 

Would be nice if they can add some international news channels like BBC, CNN and Al Jazeera. And for business traveller, it can be a bit difficult especially since there's no iron available in the room.

Other than that, I am quite pleased and will definitely stay again next time I am in Jakarta.

Der Hermes Palace ist das beste Hotel in Banda Aceh, darüber dürfte kein Zweifel bestehen. Besonders für Tagungen ist es unerlässlich, denn es verfügt über mehrere größere und kleinere Tagungs - und Diskussionssräume, die auch laufend genutzt werden. Ohne das Hermes läuft also nichts in  der Gegend an internationalen Begegnungen. Es fehlen aber noch Kleinigkweiten wie z.B. ein Exkursionsangebot und Postkarten mit Briefmarken (erstere gibt es auch nicht in der Stadt).
Günstig ist, dass man kostenlos (bei Vorinformation !) vom Flughafen abgeholt und hin gebracht wird; dieser liegt ziemlich weit weg (ca. 20 km) vom Hotel. Eine gute Idee ist auch , bei Ausgaben für Wäsche einen Gutschein für die Internetnutzung auszustellen (das System lief sehr langsam). Das Frühstück ist üppig und das Essen generell geschmacklich recht ansprengend.

バンダ･アチェ初の、2011年時点で唯一の4つ星ホテルに相応しい内装であり、部屋も申し分なし。プールとフィットネスジム、マッサージ、ファミリーカラオケもある。レストランで、「アチェ･コーヒー」を飲むことも出来る。イスラム色の強い地域柄、アルコールの提供は無い。唯一残念だったのは、部屋の洗面台に歯ブラシがなかったことくらい。
reviews.reviewPositives: ホテル内装、レストラン、部屋、すべて

reviews.reviewComments:
I am from Malaysia and this is my second time staying at this hotel. This is definitely a must-stay hotel.

1. Staff are very friendly (reception, housekeeping, concierge, cafe) 10/10
2. Hot shower broken but was fixed almost immediately (10/10)
3. Food from buffet breakfast spread was sent to the room upon special request due to guest not feeling well (10/10)
4.  Early check in was allowed (10/10)
5.  All requests were attended to almost immediately (request for ironing board/iron; ironing service) 10/10
6. At the cafe, buffet breakfast was yummy and replenishments were done although the buffet ending time was nearing. (10/10)
7. The only setback is that only one elevator was working during peak period.  (8/10)

Overall 9.5/10
